Elliptic temporal network

Bitcoin transactions, 49 time steps

Each node is a Bitcoin transaction; edges are payment relationships. The dataset spans 49 sequential snapshots (≈ 2 weeks each). Edges live entirely within a single time step.

Drag the brush below to pick a time window. Drag the handles to widen or narrow it; drag the body to slide it through time and watch the graph reform.

Background bars on the brush show transaction counts per step; red overlay shows illicit share. Hover a node to highlight it.
